sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18573" key="a)fulismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῡλ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n18573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cleaning out,</tr_> or (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὕλη</etym>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clearing of brushwood,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χωμάτων</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PColumbia Inv.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">56</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
